sample:
Once upon a time, there was a little boy named Tim. Tim loved to play outside in the sun. One day, he saw a big tree with a swing. Tim wanted to play on the swing, but he was too small to reach it.
Tim had an idea. He saw a tall ladder near the tree. He climbed up the ladder and got ready to push the swing. But when he pushed the swing, he saw that it was not a swing at all. It was a big, red balloon!
Tim was surprised and didn't know what to do. He looked at the balloon and thought for a moment. Then, he had an idea. He got his toy phone and started to play with it. Tim was happy that he could play on the swing now.
<|endoftext|>
